perspectives.label: Containers
perspectives.description: Deployable units from the C4 Container model. Source-level imports between containers are forbidden; all cross-container communication is over HTTP.

groups.label: Frontend SPA
groups.description: Single-page application serving topic study material and the AI chat practice interface. Manages session state and streams AI responses token by token.

groups.label: API Backend
groups.description: Handles session management, guardrail enforcement, server-side prompt construction, and LLM proxying with SSE streaming.

constraints.message: Frontend SPA must not import API Backend source — cross-container communication is over HTTP only.
API Backend must not import Frontend SPA source — cross-container communication is over HTTP only.

perspectives.label: API Backend — Components
perspectives.description: Internal component structure of 'API Backend' from the C4 Component model.

groups.label: SessionFunction
groups.description: Accepts the NVIDIA NIM API key from the browser, stores it in the memory cache keyed by a generated sessionId (30-min sliding expiry), and returns the sessionId.

groups.label: ChatFunction
groups.description: Resolves the caller's NVIDIA API key from cache, invokes the guardrail check, builds the system prompt server-side, calls NVIDIA NIM, and forwards the SSE stream to the browser.

groups.label: StihiaService
groups.description: Calls Stihia /v1/sense with the latest user message. Returns allowed/blocked with severity. Fails open on outage. Skipped when DISABLE_GUARDRAILS=true.

groups.label: TopicData
groups.description: Static registry of all 8 interview topics and their concepts, sample questions, and server-side system prompt builder. Clients send only a numeric topicId.

constraints.message: SessionFunction → ChatFunction dependency not declared in C4 model (workspace.dsl).
SessionFunction → StihiaService dependency not declared in C4 model (workspace.dsl).
SessionFunction → TopicData dependency not declared in C4 model (workspace.dsl).
ChatFunction → SessionFunction dependency not declared in C4 model (workspace.dsl).
StihiaService → SessionFunction dependency not declared in C4 model (workspace.dsl).
StihiaService → ChatFunction dependency not declared in C4 model (workspace.dsl).
StihiaService → TopicData dependency not declared in C4 model (workspace.dsl).
TopicData → SessionFunction dependency not declared in C4 model (workspace.dsl).
TopicData → ChatFunction dependency not declared in C4 model (workspace.dsl).
TopicData → StihiaService dependency not declared in C4 model (workspace.dsl).
